title: T03 — Annex III Use-Case Mapping (Phase 1 Scope)
description: List of AnnexIIIEntry items with provenance, produced by the Phase 1 Scope Agent. EU AI Act Annex III.

engagement_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit engagement.

entries.description: List of verified Annex III category entries. May be empty for minimal/limited risk systems.

section_title.description: Human-readable title of the Annex III category.

use_case_marker.description: Short evidence string extracted from intake docs supporting this classification.

confidence.description: Classification confidence score [0.0–1.0] from Phase 1 verifier.

provenance.description: How this entry was established: declared by client and confirmed; added by Phase 1; corrected by Phase 1; or declared but evidence-refuted.

derogation_claimed.description: Whether the provider claims an Art. 6 §3 derogation for this use case.

derogation_rationale.description: Required when derogation_claimed is true. Rationale for the Art. 6 §3 derogation claim.

verified_risk_tier.description: Risk tier determined by Phase 1 after Annex III verification and Art. 6 derogation checks.

art5_prohibited.description: True if any declared or detected use case falls under Art. 5 prohibition. Engagement halted if true.

classification_narrative.description: Optional narrative explaining the Annex III classification decisions.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this artefact was generated.
